_comment: GitHub Copilot CLI hook configuration for clean-code-codex. Script paths are relative to this file's location (gh-hooks/). Installation: set hooks path in your Copilot CLI config to point to this file.

preToolUse.description: SEC-1: Warn on hardcoded secrets before write (Claude Code: block, Copilot: warn-only)
SEC-7: Block dangerous bash injection patterns before execution
ARCH-1: Warn on domain-layer imports of app/infra before write (Claude Code: block, Copilot: warn-only)

postToolUse.description: SIZE-1/DEAD-1: Warn on oversized functions and commented-out code after write
DEP-1: Warn on known vulnerabilities after manifest write
TEST: Warn on coverage delta after write
OBS-1: Warn on missing observability patterns after write
